dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 10 Defense for each percent of health you are missing.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Survivor's Guard
dbEquipBonuses.description: Gain 15 Defense for each percent of health you are missing.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Balance
dbEquipBonuses.description: When your health is 50% or more, your Power is increased by 1500. When your health is below 50%, Defense is increased by 2000.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Warden's Haste
dbEquipBonuses.description: Whenever you are damaged for more than 10% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, your Movement Speed increases by 5% for 10 seconds.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Critical Strike. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Critical Strike. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Accuracy
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Accuracy. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Gladiator's Accuracy
dbEquipBonuses.description: For every 5 seconds you are in combat, you gain 100 Accuracy. If you stay in combat for longer than 2 minutes, this ability will no longer be active.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Prismatic Defier of Dread (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: While in The Pirates' Skyhold or Dread Sanctum, your Movement Speed is increased by 12%. Every 5s in combat, you will gain a stack of Prismatic Force. Each stack of Prismatic Force grants: General +0.15% Power, DPS +0.15% Critical Severity, Healer +0.4% Overall Outgoing Healing, Tank +0.4% Awareness.

dbEquipBonuses.name: Stormforged (2/2)
dbEquipBonuses.description: 2 of Set: While in the Underdark, gain 2% Base Damage Boost / -2% Incoming Damage / 2% Overall Outgoing Healing depending on role. When you dodge, block, sprint, or shadow slip, gain 1.5% role bonus for 15s (30s CD). When dealing Combat Advantage damage, 10% chance to gain 3% role bonus for 15s (30s CD).
